channel.title: Reviews on Villa de Tara
channel.description: Recent content in Reviews on Villa de Tara

item.title: Dive2gether
item.description: Dive2gether in Plakias is a PADI 5* Instructor Development Center. They offer a variety of recreational activities including shore diving, boat diving, snorkelling, night snorkelling/diving and a weekly BBQ. The format for the day’s activities was much as you might expect: Meet at the Dive Center for introductions, kit checks and packing Travel to the port (for boat dives) or beach (for shore dives) Arrive at the dive site. Briefing for the dive.

item.title: Omega Divers
item.description: The Omega Diving Center in Almyrida is a PADI 5* Diving Resort and we have dived with them several times. They dive Elephant Cave which has fossilised elephant teeth and stalactites, the skeleton wreck of the SS Minnewaska where you’ll see lion fish (yes, they have made it to the Mediterranean), and several other sites. Whichever site you are going to dive, the plan is much the same: Assemble at the Dive Center to meet your guides, fill out the medical forms and sort out out your kit.
